author: ferenk
description: Insert any type of short codes into your document. You can add smileys (:), ;), ...) or emojis (:smile:, :wink:, ...). More code maps will be added later. Even you, as a user can create your own.

manifest.author: Ferenc Moricz
manifest.description: Insert shortcodes into your document, e.g smileys :) or emojis :wink: . User-defined short code maps are also supported.
manifest.name: Tokenz
